Title: Display all equipment correctly
Test_Steps: 1. Open app; 2. Navigate to Equipment page
Expected_Result: All items visible with: name; category; status; location
Actual_Result: Display the correct necessary information in the expected result.

Title: Filter by single category
Preconditions: DB has items in Electronics; Mechanical; Books
Test_Steps: 1. Open Equipment page; 2. Select "Electronics" filter
Expected_Result: Only Electronics items shown; count matches DB
Actual_Result: Display the correct necessary information in the expected result.

Title: Status displays correctly
Test_Steps: 1. Open Equipment page
Expected_Result: Badges show: 🟢 Available; 🔴 Borrowed; 🟡 Maintenance
Actual_Result: The color is incorrect; the "Borrowed" status is displaying Blue (🔵) instead of Red (🔴) as required by the documentation.

Title: Borrow available item — happy path
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow on Oscilloscope; 2. Enter borrower: "John Doe"; 3. Enter date: today; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Status → Borrowed; borrower shown; history record created
Actual_Result: The status is displayed as per the proposed result.

Title: Borrower name required — empty
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Leave name empty; 3. Enter valid date; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Error: "Borrower name required"; status unchanged
Actual_Result: Okay, don't show "borrow again" when you've already borrowed.

Title: Borrow already borrowed item
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow on Drill
Expected_Result: Borrow button disabled/hidden; shows "Borrowed by Alice"
Actual_Result: It is not possible to borrow from the borrow office or the equipment section if the equipment has a "borrowed" checkmark.

Title: Return borrowed item — happy path
Test_Steps: 1. Click Return on Oscilloscope; 2. Confirm
Expected_Result: Status → Available; borrower cleared; return timestamp recorded
Actual_Result: matches the expected result.

Title: History shows complete timeline
Test_Steps: 1. Open History page
Expected_Result: Chronological list with: equipment; borrower; borrow date; return date; status
Actual_Result: Display the correct borrowing and receiving information.

Title: Active borrows marked correctly
Test_Steps: 1. Open History page
Expected_Result: Active: "Currently Borrowed" badge; Returned: return date shown
Actual_Result: Display the correct borrowing and returning functions.

Title: Add valid new item
Test_Steps: 1. Click Add; 2. Name: "Function Generator"; 3. Category: Electronics; 4. Location: Lab A; 5. Save
Test_Data: Name: "Function Generator"; Cat: Electronics; Loc: Lab A
Expected_Result: Item appears in list; status = Available
Actual_Result: TRUE

Title: Required field validation — empty name
Test_Steps: 1. Leave Name empty; 2. Fill Category; Location; 3. Save
Expected_Result: Error: "Name required"; item not added

Title: Full borrow→return→borrow cycle
Test_Steps: 1. Borrow → "Alice"; 2. Return; 3. Borrow → "Bob"; 4. Return
Expected_Result: All 4 transitions work; history has 2 complete cycles

Title: Browser refresh preserves data
Test_Steps: 1. Refresh page (F5)
Expected_Result: "Scope" still shows Borrowed by John
Actual_Result: Pressing F5 will still display the borrowed button, allowing you to reach the scope.

Title: Empty state handling
Test_Steps: 1. Open app; 2. Navigate to Equipment page
Expected_Result: Shows "No equipment found" message + Add button visible
Actual_Result: "Device not found. Use the form above to add your first item." Right above the search bar, the "+ Add new device" bar was still displayed, ready for the user to click to add a new device.

Title: Multi-category filter
Test_Steps: 1. Select "Electronics"; 2. Add "Mechanical" filter
Expected_Result: Items from both categories shown (OR logic)
Actual_Result: The Category dropdown menu does not support multi-selecting categories for filtering using OR logic.

Title: Borrow date validation — past date
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Enter name: "Jane"; 3. Enter date: yesterday; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Error: "Borrow date cannot be in past"
Actual_Result: The system must report an error and NOT allow borrowing if the borrowing date (Borrow Date) is in the past.

Title: Borrow with special characters in name
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Enter: "O'Reilly-Smith"; 3. Confirm
Expected_Result: Accepted; name stored correctly
Actual_Result: correct as required

Title: Return already available item
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt Return
Expected_Result: Return button disabled/hidden; no action possible
Actual_Result: Cannot return without permission to borrow.

Title: Double-return prevention
Test_Steps: 1. Click Return again rapidly
Expected_Result: Second click ignored; no duplicate history
Actual_Result: oke

Title: History filters by borrower
Test_Steps: 1. Filter by borrower "John"
Expected_Result: Only John's records shown

Title: History filters by date range
Test_Steps: 1. Set date range: Feb 1–Feb 28
Expected_Result: Only February records shown

Title: Search by equipment name
Test_Steps: 1. Search "scope"
Expected_Result: "Oscilloscope" shown; "Multimeter" hidden

Title: Search by borrower name
Test_Steps: 1. Search "Doe"
Expected_Result: John's records shown

Title: Case-insensitive search
Test_Steps: 1. Search "oscilloscope"
Expected_Result: Match found regardless of case

Title: Duplicate name handling
Test_Steps: 1. Add "Oscilloscope" again
Expected_Result: Error: "Equipment already exists"

Title: Category persists across sessions
Test_Steps: 1. Add item with new category "Chemical"; 2. Refresh page
Expected_Result: "Chemical" appears in filter dropdown

Title: Borrow date validation — far future
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Enter name: "Bob"; 3. Enter date: +1 year; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Warning or error: "Date too far in future"
Actual_Result: Mượn quá xa ngày thực tế, kiểu mượn chục năm cũng được, giới hạn thời gian mượn

Title: Borrow with very long name
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Enter: 200-char string; 3. Confirm
Expected_Result: Truncated or rejected with clear max-length error
Actual_Result: Giới hạn từ được đánh vào

Title: Keyboard navigation
Test_Steps: 1. Tab through all interactive elements
Expected_Result: Logical tab order; focus visible; Enter activates buttons

Title: Responsive layout
Test_Steps: 1. Resize to mobile width (375px)
Expected_Result: Table stacks horizontally; buttons remain accessible

Title: Add equipment with empty asset code
Test_Steps: 1. Open Add Equipment form; 2. Leave Asset Code empty; 3. Enter Name: "Test Equipment"; 4. Click Add Equipment
Expected_Result: Error: ""Asset Code required""; item not added

Title: Add equipment with duplicate asset code
Test_Steps: 1. Open Add Equipment form; 2. Enter Asset Code: "EQ-001"; 3. Enter Name: "Duplicate"; 4. Click Add Equipment
Expected_Result: Error: "Asset Code already exists"; item not added

Title: Add equipment with all optional fields
Test_Steps: 1. Open Add Equipment form; 2. Enter: Asset Code="EQ-NEW"; Name="Power Supply"; Category="Power"; Location="Lab C"; Status="Available"; Condition="Good"; Quantity=3; Notes="Test notes"; 3. Click Add Equipment
Test_Data: Asset Code: "EQ-NEW"; Name: "Power Supply"; Cat: Power; Loc: Lab C; Qty: 3
Expected_Result: Item appears in list with all fields correct; quantity shows 3/3

Title: Add equipment with invalid status value
Test_Steps: 1. Open Add Equipment form; 2. Enter valid Name and Asset Code; 3. Set Status to an invalid value (e.g. "Pending"); 4. Click Add Equipment
Expected_Result: Error: invalid status rejected; item not added

Title: Add equipment with invalid condition value
Test_Steps: 1. Open Add Equipment form; 2. Enter valid Name and Asset Code; 3. Set Condition to an invalid value (e.g. "New"); 4. Click Add Equipment
Expected_Result: Error: invalid condition rejected; item not added

Title: Add equipment with quantity = 0
Test_Steps: 1. Open Add Equipment form; 2. Enter valid Name and Asset Code; 3. Set Quantity to 0; 4. Click Add Equipment
Expected_Result: Error: quantity must be ≥ 1; item not added

Title: Filter equipment by status (multiselect)
Preconditions: DB has Available; Borrowed; and Maintenance items
Test_Steps: 1. Open Equipment page; 2. Select "Available" in Status filter
Expected_Result: Only Available items shown

Title: Filter equipment by location (multiselect)
Preconditions: DB has items in Lab A and Lab B
Test_Steps: 1. Open Equipment page; 2. Select "Lab A" in Location filter
Expected_Result: Only items in Lab A shown

Title: Search equipment by asset code
Test_Steps: 1. Open Equipment page; 2. Search "EQ-001"
Expected_Result: EQ-001 shown; other items hidden

Title: Delete single equipment — no active borrows
Preconditions: Equipment "EQ-099" exists with no active borrows
Test_Steps: 1. Select "EQ-099" in table; 2. Check confirmation checkbox; 3. Click Delete Equipment
Expected_Result: Item removed from list; borrow history records preserved
Actual_Result: When you remove something, the history will record it.

Title: Bulk borrow multiple equipment items
Test_Steps: 1. Select multiple rows (Ctrl+click); 2. Enter borrower name and phone; 3. Set quantities; 4. Click Confirm Borrow
Expected_Result: All selected Available items borrowed; status updated for each

Title: Bulk borrow — skip non-available items
Preconditions: DB has Available and Borrowed items
Test_Steps: 1. Select mix of Available and Borrowed items; 2. Enter valid borrower details; 3. Confirm bulk borrow
Expected_Result: Available items borrowed; Borrowed items skipped with notice

Title: Bulk delete equipment items
Preconditions: DB has 3+ items with no active borrows
Test_Steps: 1. Select multiple rows (Ctrl+click); 2. Check confirmation checkbox; 3. Click Delete Equipment
Expected_Result: All selected items removed from list

Title: Bulk delete — skip items with active borrows
Preconditions: DB has items with and without active borrows
Test_Steps: 1. Select mix of items (some with active borrows); 2. Check confirmation; 3. Click Delete
Expected_Result: Items with active borrows skipped; only non-borrowed items deleted
Actual_Result: There are five items in a set, but four have been borrowed, leaving one available. I can't delete that one item.

Title: Borrow partial copies from multi-quantity item
Test_Steps: 1. Select "EQ-MQ"; 2. Set borrow quantity to 1; 3. Enter borrower details; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Status stays Available; available shows 1/4; history records qty=1

Title: Borrow from Borrow & Return page — happy path
Test_Steps: 1. Open Borrow & Return page; 2. Select equipment from dropdown; 3. Enter borrower name and phone; 4. Click Confirm Borrow
Expected_Result: Item borrowed; appears in active borrows table

Title: Borrower phone validation — too short
Test_Steps: 1. Open Borrow & Return page; 2. Select equipment; 3. Enter phone: "123" (3 digits); 4. Click Confirm Borrow
Expected_Result: Error: phone must be at least 8 digits; borrow rejected
Actual_Result: The number must have 10 characters.

Title: Bulk return — return selected items
Test_Steps: 1. Open Borrow & Return page; 2. Check boxes on multiple rows; 3. Click Return Selected
Expected_Result: All selected items returned; status updated to Available

Title: Return all matching filter
Preconditions: Active borrows exist in multiple categories
Test_Steps: 1. Open Borrow & Return page; 2. Filter by category; 3. Click Return All Matching Filter
Expected_Result: All filtered items returned; list empties

Title: Dashboard summary cards match actual data
Preconditions: DB has equipment with various statuses
Test_Steps: 1. Open Dashboard page
Expected_Result: Total Items, Available, Borrowed, Maintenance counts match actual DB state

Title: Dashboard charts render with data
Preconditions: DB has equipment in 2+ categories and 2+ locations
Test_Steps: 1. Open Dashboard page
Expected_Result: Category and Location charts display with correct groupings

Title: History status filter (Active/Returned/Overdue)
Preconditions: History has Active; Returned; and Overdue records
Test_Steps: 1. Open History page; 2. Select "Active" from status filter
Expected_Result: Only Active records shown

Title: History monthly grouping — current month expanded
Preconditions: History has records in current and previous months
Test_Steps: 1. Open History page
Expected_Result: Current month section expanded; previous months collapsed

Title: Overdue page displays overdue items
Preconditions: At least 1 item is overdue (past expected return date)
Test_Steps: 1. Open Overdue page
Expected_Result: Overdue items table shown with: asset code; borrower; phone; days overdue

Title: Overdue contact list — copy for messaging
Test_Steps: 1. Open Overdue page; 2. Locate the copy-for-messaging section
Expected_Result: Formatted text block with borrower name; phone; equipment details; overdue days

Title: Overdue contact list — download for printing
Test_Steps: 1. Open Overdue page; 2. Click Download Overdue Contact List
Expected_Result: .txt file downloads with bulletin-board formatted table

Title: CSV import — valid file with all columns
Preconditions: CSV file with valid equipment data exists
Test_Steps: 1. Open Settings page; 2. Upload CSV file; 3. Review preview; 4. Click Import
Test_Data: CSV: valid UTF-8 with all columns
Expected_Result: All rows imported; success count shown
Actual_Result: The quantity field was not cast to a number type; it's currently a string. When you enter the number 1, it doesn't understand and therefore doesn't accept it.

Title: CSV import — missing required columns
Test_Steps: 1. Open Settings page; 2. Upload CSV missing required columns; 3. Observe error
Expected_Result: Error: required columns missing; import blocked

Title: CSV export — download equipment data
Test_Steps: 1. Open Settings page; 2. Click Export button
Expected_Result: CSV downloads with all equipment records; correct columns

Title: Load sample data
Test_Steps: 1. Open Settings page; 2. Enter password; 3. Click Load Sample Data
Expected_Result: 8 sample equipment items appear in Equipment list
